title: erigeron aurantiacus
intro: Erigeron aurantiacus, also known as Orange Fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to the western coast of North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and calm the nervous system. Orange Fleabane has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea, menstrual cramps, and respiratory issues, and is also valued for its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Erigeron aurantiacus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
